name: CLX - MGA Insurance Principal Leads List v1

meta.notes: MGA principal view of ALL insurance-vertical leads. POST /webhook/mga/insurance/principal/leads-list with optional { filters: { status, source, lead_id, limit } }. Auth: mga_principal | compliance_officer | supervisor | admin. Returns leads filtered to insurance sources (advisor_application, carrier_inquiry, marketplace_*, marketing_site) OR industry=insurance AND lead_type=b2c_consumer. Includes per-source counts so the dashboard can show 'X advisor apps, Y marketplace, Z B2C'.
